stories.title: Torres Watch — Day 6, Nine Days Left and No Decision
stories.angle: D1 Softball Player of the Year Isa Torres (.530 BA / .978 SLG / .591 OBP / 78 runs) enters Day 6 of the 15-day portal window without a commitment. Texas and Texas A&M remain the frontrunners. Torres is from Georgetown, TX — 30 minutes from the UT campus — and her hometown teammate Samantha Swan signed with Texas two days ago. Nine days remain. The most important portal decision of the cycle is still unresolved.

article.headline: Torres Watch: Day 6, Nine Days Left and No Decision

research.facts:
Torres Watch — Day 6
**Sources:**
- Washington Post / Fox Sports: Torres entered portal June 8. D1 Softball POY, ACC POY. School records: .530 BA, .978 SLG, .591 OBP, 78 runs. NCAA record: hit in 16 consecutive at-bats.
- SI.com: "Texas Softball Linked to Star Infielder in Transfer Portal" — Texas reported as primary destination
- On3.com: "2026-27 Softball Transfer Portal" — Torres listed as No. 2 overall by Softball America (behind Beachum)
- Georgetown, TX connection: Torres hometown 30 minutes from UT Austin campus; Swan (committed to Texas June 10) is from same hometown
- No commitment reported as of June 13 (Day 6); portal closes June 22
- Confidence: HIGH on stats (multiple independent sources), MEDIUM on specific destination (reported, not confirmed)
**Freshness:** Day 6 of portal window. Swan already committed to Texas. Nine days remain.

stories.title: Beachum — Day 6 Uncommitted, No. 1 Transfer Still Waiting
stories.angle: Jaysoni Beachum (.417 BA / 16 HR / 66 RBI / .549 OBP) — ranked No. 1 overall transfer by Softball America — enters Day 6 with no commitment. Career line: .375 BA, 37 HRs, 180 RBIs, 202 hits in three seasons at FSU. NFCA 2024 Freshman of the Year, 2026 Second-Team All-American. The longer she waits, the more leverage she builds — but the window closes June 22.

article.headline: Beachum Watch: No. 1 Transfer Still Uncommitted on Day 6

research.facts:
Beachum — Day 6
**Sources:**
- 247Sports: "Florida State junior third baseman Jaysoni Beachum shares intentions to enter the NCAA Transfer Portal"
- SI.com: "Florida State Softball All-American Enters Transfer Portal" — entered June 2
- D1Softball.com: "Jaysoni Beachum Entering Transfer Portal" — 2026 season: .417 BA / 16 HR / 66 RBI / .549 OBP / 54 walks
- SI.com transfer rankings: "2026 College Softball Transfer Portal Rankings: Top 10 Available Players" — Beachum ranked No. 1 by Softball America
- Career (3 seasons FSU): .375 BA / 37 HR / 35 2B / 180 RBI / 158 runs / 202 hits / .654 SLG / .492 OBP
- NFCA 2024 Freshman of the Year; 2026 Second-Team All-American
- No commitment as of June 13
- Confidence: HIGH on stats (multiple sources), HIGH on ranking (Softball America confirmed)
**Freshness:** Still uncommitted Day 6. Major prize.

stories.title: Polar — Day 6 Still Available, Purdue's All-American Waits on Right Fit
stories.angle: Moriah Polar (.555 BA / 101 hits / 2nd-Team All-American) enters Day 6 of the portal window uncommitted. Career: .436 BA, 218 hits, 103 RBIs, 137 runs, 81-of-94 stolen bases at Purdue. Ranked No. 5 overall by On3. Polar is a contact-and-speed dynamo who elevates any lineup — and she is somehow still available with nine days left in the window.

article.headline: Moriah Polar: The Portal's Overlooked Gem Is Still Available on Day 6

research.facts:
Polar — Day 6
**Sources:**
- On3.com: "All-American outfielder Moriah Polar to enter transfer portal" — entered June 8; one year eligibility
- SI.com: "Purdue Softball All-American Makes Surprising Transfer Portal Move 2026"
- Purdue Exponent: confirms Polar entered portal; led nation in batting in 2026
- 2026 season: .555 BA / 101 hits
- Career (3 seasons Purdue): .436 BA / 218 hits / 103 RBI / 137 runs / 81-of-94 SB (86%)
- On3 ranking: No. 5 overall transfer (97.00 rating)
- No commitment as of June 13 (Day 6)
- Confidence: HIGH on stats (multiple sources), HIGH on ranking (On3 confirmed)
**Freshness:** Day 6 still uncommitted. Window halfway done.

stories.title: Portal Midpoint — Arkansas and Texas A&M Fill Roster Holes
stories.angle: While the headliners remain uncommitted, programs are locking down depth. Arkansas and Texas A&M are making notable portal additions at the midpoint of the window. The Aggies are adding key pieces while also remaining in heavy pursuit of Torres. The activity signals that programs aren't waiting for the big fish — they're building complete rosters simultaneously.

article.headline: Portal Midpoint: Arkansas and Texas A&M Fill Roster Holes While the Headlines Wait

research.facts:
Portal Midpoint — Arkansas and Texas A&M
**Sources:**
- SI.com: "Arkansas, Texas A&M, and Alabama Softball Make Offseason Noise With Major Transfer Portal Additions" — includes Ava Zachary, Maddox McKee, Kailee Plumlee (to Alabama, confirmed June 12)
- SI.com: "Texas A&M Aggies Officially Sign Transfer Portal Star Maya Bland" — additional Aggie portal addition
- On3.com: Texas A&M listed in portal activity for this window
- Alabama secured Plumlee (June 10 — covered June 12 pipeline); Arkansas and A&M filling depth simultaneously
- Confidence: HIGH on program activity (multiple sources), MEDIUM on specific player names beyond confirmed Plumlee
**Freshness:** New story for June 13. Programs acting while top names stay uncommitted.

stories.title: Portal Window Countdown — 9 Days, 3 Stars Still Available
stories.angle: With nine days left in the 15-day transfer portal window (closes June 22), the landscape check: signed and gone — Swan (Texas), Plumlee (Alabama), Altmeyer (Texas). Still available: Torres (D1 POY), Beachum (No. 1 Softball America), Polar (No. 5 On3). The three biggest uncommitted names are still up for grabs at the halfway point. Whoever lands all three wins the portal.

article.headline: Portal Countdown: Nine Days Left, Three Elite Players Still Up for Grabs

research.facts:
Portal Countdown Tracker
**Sources:**
- On3.com: "Samantha Swan commits to Texas" — Swan signed June 10 (confirmed)
- Rocky Top Insider: Kailey Plumlee to Alabama (confirmed June 10)
- SI.com: "Texas Softball Picks Up Former Arizona Utility Player Via Transfer Portal" — Kaiah Altmeyer to Texas
- On3.com transfer portal wire: Torres, Beachum, Polar all listed as uncommitted
- Portal window: June 8–22 (15 days); Day 6 = June 13
- Confidence: HIGH on commitments (confirmed via official sources), HIGH on uncommitted list (no news of commitment from any of the three)
**Freshness:** Evergreen tracker — window is half over.
